---
output: github_document
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  eval = FALSE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
library(knitr)
```


# README

This is an R package to create model diagrams for hierarchical linear mixed effects models by Greta Linse and Mark Greenwood.  

## Package Documentation

Details about the package are available in Linse (2026)  <doi:10.6339/26-JDS1222>.

## Installation from GitHub

To install the latest development version you can install the package from GitHub.
To do so you must install the `remotes` package first.

```{r install-devtools, eval=FALSE}
install.packages("remotes")
```

Then, use `install_github` to install this package.

```{r install-modeldiagramr, eval=FALSE}
remotes::install_github("glinse-stat/modeldiagramR")
```

This package provides code and data sets to support and is publicly available 
for others to use. It is licensed under GPL-3.
